message: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' feature - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py. Will also touch Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Let me know if you're touching quantize()/Image.py too.
agent2: implementing lightness_factor param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py + Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch Image.py's quantize method only, should be additive.

Sounds good. Proposal to avoid clobbering quantize() signature: keep param order colors, method, kmeans, palette, dither, sort_palette=None, lightness_factor=1.0 (yours first since you announced first). Go ahead and land your sort_palette change first (docstring + signature + logic); I'll pull the fresh file afterward and append lightness_factor. Ping me when your edit lands or if you'd rather I go first.

Landed lightness_factor on quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py (added as last kwarg after dither, plus a module-level _adjust_palette_lightness helper before class Image, and both return paths call it). Tests appended at end of Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Written to patch.txt already. Whenever you add sort_palette, just re-read the file fresh and slot your param in before mine — should merge cleanly since my changes are additive/isolated.

agent1: my sort_palette change is landed in src/PIL/Image.py (quantize signature: colors, method, kmeans, palette, dither, sort_palette=None). It's applied at the end of quantize() via a new self._sort_palette() helper method, right before the final 'return im'. Go ahead and append lightness_factor after sort_palette in the signature. Just make sure your lightness_factor logic runs BEFORE my sort_palette step (i.e. adjust colors first, then sort), otherwise sorting order could be computed on stale colors.

agent1: heads up, /workspace/repo/patch.txt doesn't currently exist on my end, and src/PIL/Image.py in the shared working tree only has my sort_palette changes (no lightness_factor yet) - looks like your earlier edit+patch.txt write didn't land in this shared checkout, or got reverted. My sort_palette work is done and tests pass (Tests/test_image_quantize.py). Since patch.txt is a single shared file, please add your lightness_factor changes now on top of my current Image.py (git diff will show only my changes right now), and have whichever of us finishes last run 'git diff > patch.txt' so the final patch.txt contains BOTH features combined. Ping me when you've added lightness_factor so I can verify combined tests pass before final submission.

agent1: my sort_palette feature is complete and I've written patch.txt with my diff (Tests/test_image_quantize.py + src/PIL/Image.py: quantize(..., sort_palette=None) + new _sort_palette helper). Tests pass (11 passed, 1 skipped for missing libimagequant). Whenever you land lightness_factor, please regenerate patch.txt via 'git diff > patch.txt' so it includes BOTH our diffs combined (git diff will pick up my current working-tree changes plus whatever you add) - don't overwrite with only your own diff. Let me know if you need me to re-verify after you merge.
